Their experiences resonated with participants, offering inspiration and relatability. These leaders, who occupy prominent roles such as C-suite executives, Presidents, Senior Vice Presidents, Vice Presidents, and Founders, demonstrated openness and vulnerability in sharing their journeys. As a result, participants were motivated to consider moving beyond their silos.
For more information contact Bonnie Lappin bonnie@rxvp.org or Suzette DiMascio suzette@rxvp.org

Why Join RxVP?

Who you are:

  • • You’ve led teams through uncharted territories of science and strategy—shaping what’s next for the life sciences industry.
  • • You operate at the VP level or higher, guiding innovation with vision and influence.
  • • You are bold—driven to make an impact, and ready to share your story with the world.

RxVP was built for executives like you: poised to inspire as a solo speaker, panelist, or fireside guest—while engaging in real-time conversations through live Q&A.

Apply for a Speaker Invitation

Speaking Opportunities with RxVP

  • Curated Global Engagements: RxVP connects senior leaders with curated virtual speaking opportunities across business units, ERGs, special events, and leadership seminars within leading life science organizations worldwide.
  • Tailored Speaking Matches: Each member is thoughtfully matched as a speaker, panelist, or fireside guest—whether across town or across the globe. You choose the opportunities that align best with your interests, schedule, and visibility goals.
  • Commitment: Typical engagements require three hours total (including preparation and appearance), allowing you to make a high-impact contribution without overextending your calendar.
  • Mutual Exchange of Value: Participation includes one to two speaking engagements for you and one to two speaker opportunities for your organization—building reciprocal visibility across the RxVP network.
  • Strategic Association Partnerships: We collaborate with premier life science associations globally to expand access to exceptional VP-level speakers who inspire and elevate professional communities.
  • Seamless Execution: RxVP manages all logistics and placement details—so you can simply show up and shine.

Each RxVP panel brings together three accomplished senior leaders from distinct life science companies, guided by a skilled moderator for a dynamic one-hour virtual discussion and 25-minute live Q&A.

Topics center on executive career advancement, featuring authentic stories, leadership insights, and actionable takeaways that resonate with emerging and established leaders alike.

Our purpose is clear: to shift mindsets—inspiring every participant to see themselves reflected in today's trailblazers and go farther, faster.

Speaker Commitment: One high-impact, virtual engagement.

Exclusive Audience Access: Each speaker receives up to 400 audience invitations, redeemable across multiple RxVP events and regions.

Meet The Founders

Bonnie Lappin

CREATOR, CO-FOUNDER, AND BUILDER OF THE HEALTHCARE BUSINESSWOMEN'S AMBASSADOR PROGRAM
Bonnie Lappin is an esteemed leader known for her dedication to fostering professional growth and innovation. Her career reflects a profound commitment to empowering individuals and shaping organizations to achieve exceptional results.

Bonnie co-founded and built the Healthcare Businesswomen's Ambassador Program (HBA), the signature leadership development program of HBA – a global non-profit organization with 20,000 members and 140 corporate partners. The Ambassador Program has engaged over 9,000 participants worldwide to date.

She has served on HBA boards in Boston, Europe, and Florida and co-founded the HBA Miami chapter.

Since 1990, Bonnie has also served as President of The Lappin Company, specializing in executive search and career consulting. Her leadership impact spans globally, having spoken on leadership and career development in the U.S., Switzerland, India, Malaysia, Japan, France, UK, Germany, Singapore, and Ireland.

Bonnie has mentored hundreds of professionals worldwide and is internationally recognized for advancing leadership in the life sciences industry. She was awarded the PharmaVOICE 100 Award in 2017 and is the sole recipient of the HBA Visionary Leader Award.

Suzette DiMascio

CREATOR, CO-FOUNDER, AND Executive Healthcare Strategist
Recognized internationally as a trusted advisor, innovator, investor, media contributor, and sought-after keynote speaker, Suzette possesses a relentless drive to transform patient care - teamed with a keen ability to assess and assimilate ideas to drive financial success aligned with corporate culture and business growth.

As the founder and former CEO of CSI Specialty Group, Suzette built one of the industry's top-ranked consulting firms, guiding Fortune 500 manufacturers, integrated delivery networks (IDNs), and private equity-backed ventures through complex challenges in commercialization, workforce planning, digital health, and market access. Under her leadership, CSI received national recognition from Consulting Magazine, Goldman Sachs, and The Commonwealth Institute for rapid growth and industry innovation.

Suzette is also a passionate advocate. She launched the industry's first specialty pharmacy podcast, was inducted into the APPA Hall of Fame, and has served in appointed leadership roles, including the Florida State Board of Employee Leasing and Florida's Talent Caucus. She is a Founding Member and past Board Director for the National Association of Specialty Pharmacy (NASP), Past Global Director of HMA's Ambassador Program, and serves on several industry advisory boards.

Today, she brings her entrepreneurial mindset to a Fortune 15 company, helping to shape strategy across the Evernorth and Cigna ecosystem to further enhance patient care. Whether advising the C-suite, mentoring future leaders, or reimagining patient access models, Suzette leads with integrity, vision, and a relentless commitment to making healthcare better for everyone

Frequently Asked Questions

RxVP Asia Pacific

Asia Pacific: Shaping the Future of Life Sciences Leadership

From regional strength to global influence, Asia Pacific leaders are defining the next era of Life Sciences.

Why RxVP?

Behind every breakthrough is a leadership journey.

RxVP brings those journeys forward, creating direct access to global innovators and senior executives who share the defining moments that shaped their paths.

Participants don’t simply hear expertise.

They engage with lived experience.

By connecting leaders across regions and disciplines, RxVP strengthens perspective, sharpens leadership capability, and builds meaningful professional community across the Life Sciences ecosystem.

Why Asia Pacific, Now?

Asia Pacific has become one of the most strategically significant regions in global Life Sciences.

India, in particular, has emerged as a major innovation and capability hub, with nearly 80% of the world’s top 15 pharmaceutical companies establishing Global Capability Centers, GCCs, in the country. Across the region, investment, talent density, and executive influence continue to accelerate.

This is no longer a region contributing at the margins, it is helping shape global strategy.

With growth comes the need for deeper leadership connection and trusted platforms for peer exchange.

RxVP Asia Pacific meets this moment, fostering dialogue, strengthening collaboration, and ensuring the region plays an active role in shaping the future of Life Sciences.

Leadership in Asia Pacific

RxVP Asia Pacific is led by Dr. Deepa Desai, based in Mumbai, whose career spans more than two decades of global healthcare leadership.

She has held senior executive roles at IQVIA and LabCorp, leading global teams of more than 5,000 professionals across complex, multi market environments.

She is also the founder of one of India’s first Healthcare Leadership Summits, 2024, convening leaders from over 25 organizations to advance executive collaboration.

Her appointment reflects RxVP’s commitment to ensuring Asia Pacific is not only represented on the global stage, but actively shaping it.

Dr. Deepa Desai

RxVP Head of Asia Pacific, Mumbai
